# Process-preserving Codex Desktop refresh

metadata:
- checkpoint_id: checkpoint-eb23a0fbeb12
- project_id: codex-workspace
- change_type: maintenance
- created_at: 2026-07-20T02:52:40.924072+00:00

## Summary
Replaced the destructive synchronous Desktop close/relaunch path with the existing CDP Page.reload owner, projected the owner and facade to Windows, and repaired exposed WSL node_repl projection/orphan drift.

## Changed Files
- codex-home/scripts/restart-codex-desktop-cdp.ps1
- workspace/_bridge/codex_desktop_model_runtime.py
- workspace/_bridge/codex_model_provider_tests.py
- workspace/_bridge/codex_startup_chain_tests.py
- workspace/_bridge/docs/maintenance_surface_map.md
- workspace/_bridge/system_membership.py
- workspace/_bridge/system_membership_tests.py
- workspace/_bridge/wsl_workspace_owner.py
- workspace/_bridge/wsl_workspace_owner_tests.py

## Evidence
- commit=65c49b8b4dfd40de5b8d949aa922d3dae915997c
- windows_bare_main=65c49b8b4dfd40de5b8d949aa922d3dae915997c
- desktop_refresh=exit_0_same_pid_cdp_ready

## Verification
- process-preserving Desktop refresh exited 0 and preserved main PID 21016 with CDP ready
- startup-chain 15/15
- wsl-workspace-owner 25/25
- system-membership 38/38
- protocol compatibility validate ok
- native deprecationNotice opt-out honored
- global coherence ok after WSL config convergence and safe orphan cleanup

## Backups
- /home/codexlab/.codex-app/backups/work-git/202607/codex-startup/20260720-023921-691216-9266b946-local-edit/manifest.json
- /home/codexlab/.codex-app/backups/202607/wsl-desktop-runtime/20260720-024913-408494-9dc98d5c-wsl-codex-runtime-materialize/manifest.json

## Stable Conclusions
- Use CDP Page.reload for Desktop UI/config refresh
- never close the GUI from the task whose continuation depends on that process.

## Followups
- none recorded

# Adopt WSL Work Git as the active authority
